purpose: Own demo-only control parsing, DOM element lookup, and live perf overlay helpers for the Kajillion demo.
invariants: Feature helpers take explicit inputs instead of importing demo main state.
Graph lifecycle and hot render-loop behavior remain in demo/src/main.ts.
DOM IDs are looked up only in dom.ts.
Perf overlay rendering must preserve the existing 250 ms timer cadence.
change_protocols: When adding controls, update dom.ts and controls.ts together.
When changing overlay metrics, keep timing math in perf-overlay.ts and avoid touching graph modules.
When moving more code out of main.ts, prefer a new small module in this feature with a typed entrypoint.
